data.name: AllowAdbHardRestart
data.value: Attempt to kill and restart ADB process after connection failure

data.name: AllowAdbRestart
data.value: Attempt to restart ADB Server after connection failure

data.name: AnimatedBackgroundDescription
data.value: Enable/disable background animations, which are driven by the currently active effect.

data.name: ApplyControllerType
data.value: Select the Controller Type to Apply

data.name: BackgroundStyleDescription
data.value: Select from the built-in background styles.

data.name: BackgroundTransitionsDescription
data.value: Enable/disable background transitions with smooth fading effects when changing styles.

data.name: ClipboardDataError
data.value: The data currently in the clipboard cannot be converted to text.

data.name: ConfirmExitText
data.value: Are you sure want to exit?

data.name: ConfirmExitTitle
data.value: The current program is performing tasks

data.name: CurrentResourcesNotSupportGitHub
data.value: The current resources do not support GitHub.

data.name: CurrentResourcesNotSupportMirror
data.value: The current resources do not support Mirror Chyan.

data.name: DebugModeWarning
data.value: Debug mode has been enabled. This mode will save screenshots, operation data, and image recognition visualization results during operation, which may occupy a large amount of storage space!

data.name: DuplicateTaskError
data.value: Duplicate task name found in Pipeline file: "{0}"!

data.name: DuplicateTaskNameError
data.value: A task with the name "{0}" already exists in the task list.

data.name: EnableSaveOnError
data.value: Enable save screenshot on error (for debugging)

data.name: ExternalNotificationTips
data.value: Please note: The external notification feature currently only sends 「All tasks completed」 notifications.

data.name: FailToGetCurrentVersionInfo
data.value: Failed to get the current version information and cannot update.

data.name: FailToGetDownloadUrl
data.value: Unable to get the resource download link, update failed.

data.name: FailToGetLatestVersionInfo
data.value: Failed to get the latest version information

data.name: ForceScheduledStartTip
data.value: Stop current task, then start new tasks after stopping completes

data.name: GameResourceUpdated
data.value: Game resources updated, please restart software.

data.name: GlobalConfigTip
data.value: This option page is for global config

data.name: InstanceConfigTip
data.value: This option page is instance-scoped. Current instance:

data.name: HardRestartAdb
data.value: Trying to kill and restart the ADB process

data.name: HotKeyChangingTip
data.value: Press Backspace / Esc / Delete to clear the current value

data.name: HotKeyOccupiedBy
data.value: ⚠️ This hotkey is already used by {0}

data.name: GlobalConfigFileAccessError
data.value: Global config file is unavailable: {0}\nOccupied/Error detail: {1}

data.name: InitInstanceFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize MAA instance, a connection error or resource file corruption occurred, please refer to the logs.

data.name: LanguageOptionDescription
data.value: Select application display language, changes will take effect immediately.

data.name: LoadPipelineErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to load or parse the pipeline file: {0}

data.name: MaaFwIsLatestVersion
data.value: MaaFW is already in the latest version!

data.name: MFAIsLatestVersion
data.value: Software is already in the latest version!

data.name: MinimizeToTrayDescription
data.value: When enabled, clicking the minimize button will hide the window to the system tray instead of the taskbar.

data.name: MirrorAutoUpdatePrompt
data.value: Please purchase the Mirror Chyan service to enable automatic updates, or switch the download source to GitHub

data.name: MirrorUseLimitReached
data.value: The usage of Mirror Chyan has reached the limit.

data.name: NewVersionAvailableLatestVersion
data.value: new version is available! Latest version:

data.name: NoTaskToStop
data.value: There is no task to stop!

data.name: PipelineLoadError
data.value: Error occurred while loading Pipeline file: {0}

data.name: ResourcesAreLatestVersion
data.value: Resources are already in the latest version!

data.name: RestartAdb
data.value: Trying to restart the ADB Server

data.name: RetryOnDisconnected
data.value: Retry launching the emulator when ADB connection fails

data.name: RetryOnDisconnectedWin32
data.value: Retry launching the game when Win32 connection fails

data.name: AutoDetectOnConnectionFailed
data.value: Auto detect available devices on connection failed

data.name: AutoConnectAfterRefresh
data.value: Auto connect after refreshing device list

data.name: SavePipelineWarning
data.value: There are tasks with duplicate names in the task list!

data.name: ShowDisclaimerNoMore
data.value: Do not prompt again until the next update

data.name: TaskAllCompletedWithTime
data.value: All tasks have been completed!\n(Elapsed time {0}h {1}m {2}s)

data.name: TaskNotFoundError
data.value: The task "{2}" used in {1} of "{0}" does not exist in the Pipeline file!

data.name: TimerCustomConfigTip
data.value: Restart and switch configuration two minutes in advance

data.name: WaitSoftware
data.value: Wait time for game to start (seconds)

data.name: SetUniqueIdentifier
data.value: Set Unique Identifier for Custom Configuration

data.name: CreateFromCurrent
data.value: Create New Template from Current Configuration

data.name: ConfigurePrimaryAccent
data.value: Configure Primary and Accent Colors and Apply to Application

data.name: ErrorWhenCheck
data.value: Failed to check for the latest version of {0}.

data.name: MirrorCdkExpired
data.value: CDK has expired, please renew and try again.

data.name: MirrorCdkInvalid
data.value: CDK is invalid, please check your input.

data.name: MirrorCdkMismatch
data.value: CDK type does not match the resource.

data.name: AgentTcpModeDescription
data.value: If the app crashes immediately after starting a task, try enabling this. Only use in this case, otherwise it may affect performance.

data.name: GlobalHotkeyServiceError
data.value: Global Hotkey Service Failed to Load

data.name: UiVersionBelowResourceRequirement
data.value: The current UI version {0} is lower than the minimum required version {1} for the resource. Some functions may not work properly. Please update the software.

data.name: ExportLogNoEligibleFiles
data.value: No eligible log files or images were found.

data.name: StopTaskBeforeExportLog
data.value: Please stop the task before exporting logs

data.name: StopTaskBeforeClearCache
data.value: Please stop the task before clearing cache

data.name: MirrorCdkEmpty
data.value: Please go to the "Update Settings" in the "Settings", switch the "update source" to "GitHub", or fill in Mirror CDK

data.name: ContinueRunningWhenError
data.value: Whether to continue running other tasks after a task fails

data.name: CurrentOtherUpdatingTask
data.value: There are other ongoing update tasks currently

data.name: ScreenshotEmpty
data.value: The current screenshot is empty! Please click [Screenshot Test] to get a screenshot

data.name: HashVerificationFailed
data.value: Hash verification failed! The resource may be corrupted, possibly due to network fluctuations. Please try re-downloading the resource.

data.name: FileLoadFailedDetail
data.value: Please check if the {0} file format is correct, there may be JSON syntax errors

data.name: SwitchUiUpdateSourceToGithub
data.value: Since Mirror Chyan cannot specify a specific version for update, please go to update settings and switch the update source to GitHub.

data.name: MultiInstanceUnderSamePath
data.value: Only one instance can be launched under the same path!

data.name: UiDoesNotSupportResourceUpdateCancelled
data.value: The current version of the UI does not support the resources to be updated, and the update has been cancelled.

data.name: UiDoesNotSupportCurrentResource
data.value: The current version of the UI does not support the current resource!

data.name: NotificationDescription
data.value: When enabled, system notifications will be displayed when tasks complete or important events occur.

data.name: ExternalNotificationLarkWebhookDescription
data.value: After filling in the Webhook address, you do not need to fill in the Lark ID and Bot Token

data.name: LoadResourcesFailedDetail
data.value: Please delete the entire folder and redownload, or contact the project maintainer.

data.name: NoEmulatorFoundDetail
data.value: Please ensure that the emulator's ADB function is enabled, bridge mode is disabled, and try connecting again after restarting MFA and the emulator.

data.name: BackgroundImageDescription
data.value: Select an image as the window background, which will be overlaid on top of the default background effect.

data.name: BackgroundImageOpacityDescription
data.value: Adjust the opacity of the background image. Lower values make the image more transparent.

data.name: FontScaleDescription
data.value: Adjust the overall font scale of the interface. All fonts will be scaled proportionally.

data.name: ResourceNotSupportController
data.value: Current controller {1} does not support resource {0}, auto-switched to {2}. Please check resource settings.

data.name: ResourceNotSelected
data.value: No resource selected. Please select a resource first.

data.name: DeviceNotSelected
data.value: No device selected. Please select a device first.

data.name: LiveViewNoImageReasonAdb
data.value: Possible causes: emulator window minimized/screen off, incompatible screencap mode, or device not fully started

data.name: LiveViewNoImageReasonWindow
data.value: Possible causes: target window minimized/hidden/occluded, incompatible screencap mode

data.name: LiveViewNoImageWarning
data.value: Live view is connected but no frame is available ({0}), {1}

data.name: ResourceLayoutUpdatedContent
data.value: Resource layout file changed. Latest layout has been applied and current layout overwritten.

data.name: PlatformNotSupportedOperation
data.value: This operation is not supported on the current platform

data.name: AdminPermissionRequiredDetail
data.value: The current controller requires administrator privileges. Please restart this application as administrator.

data.name: MSVC2022Missing
data.value: Missing runtime detected. Please try to download and install the latest Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable (x64).

data.name: RuntimeMissingDescription
data.value: MFAAvalonia requires Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable (x64) to run.

data.name: InstallingStatus
data.value: Waiting for installation to complete, please complete the operation in the popped up installation window.

data.name: InstallSuccess
data.value: Installation Completed. Please restart the application.

data.name: RuntimeMissingPrompt
data.value: Click the button below to automatically download and run the installer, please note to click install in the popped up window.

data.name: TempDirWarningMain
data.value: It seems you double-clicked the program inside the zip file.

data.name: TempDirWarningDesc
data.value: The program is running in a temporary directory and may be lost when closed. Please extract the zip file to a folder first, then run the program inside.

data.name: TempDirWarningHint
data.value: Tip: It is recommended to extract to a dedicated folder, e.g. "D:\MFA", avoid Desktop or Download folders for better management.

data.name: TutorialStepConnectDesc
data.value: This is the top toolbar containing resource switching, controller selection, device connection and more. Let's walk through each one.

data.name: TutorialStepAddTaskDesc
data.value: Check the tasks you want to run in the task list. Drag to reorder. Click the settings icon on the right side of each task to view its detailed parameters in the Task Settings panel.

data.name: TutorialStepMultiConfigDesc
data.value: Step 3: Create or switch configurations via the top tab bar — e.g. one for daily automation, another for real-time tools. Each config has independent tasks and device settings.

data.name: TutorialStepTaskOptionsDesc
data.value: This panel shows detailed parameter settings for the selected task. Click the settings icon next to different tasks in the task list to switch between their options.

data.name: TutorialStepSettingsDesc
data.value: Click the settings icon at the bottom of the left sidebar to configure global options like theme, language, and notifications.

data.name: TutorialStepResourceDesc
data.value: Use this dropdown to switch between different resource packs. Different packs may contain different task sets and configurations.

data.name: TutorialStepControllerDesc
data.value: Select the controller type: Desktop, Desktop-Alt, Desktop-Foreground, or Android, etc. Choose the connection method that fits your use case.

data.name: TutorialStepDeviceDesc
data.value: Select the target device or window to connect to. The dropdown shows currently available devices.

data.name: TutorialStepConnectionDesc
data.value: Here you'll find buttons to refresh the device list, reconnect, and a connection status indicator (green = connected, red = disconnected). Click "Start Task" to run your checked tasks.

data.name: TutorialStepLogDesc
data.value: Log messages during task execution are displayed here for real-time monitoring and troubleshooting.

data.name: TutorialStepSelectAllDesc
data.value: These two buttons quickly check or uncheck all tasks. The left one is "Select All" and the right one is "Deselect All".

data.name: TutorialStepAddTaskBtnDesc
data.value: The "Add Task" button adds new tasks to the list; the "Reset Tasks" button restores the task list to its default state.

data.name: TutorialStepResetTaskDesc
data.value: Click this button to start executing checked tasks. Click again while running to stop.

data.name: TutorialStepTaskInteractDesc
data.value: Left-click the checkbox to check/uncheck a task; right-click the checkbox to set it to "run only once" (indeterminate state).

data.name: TutorialStepTaskItemTipDesc
data.value: Right-click a task item to open a context menu for running individually, adding remarks, or deleting. Click the settings icon on the right to view task parameters.

data.name: TutorialStepExportLogDesc
data.value: Click this button to export run logs to a file for troubleshooting or sharing with developers.

data.name: TutorialStepSettingsPageDesc
data.value: This is the Settings page. Use the side or top navigation bar to quickly jump to different setting categories. The right side shows detailed settings for the selected category.

data.name: TutorialStepStartupSettingsDesc
data.value: Configure automatic actions before and after tasks, emulator/game launch path, startup parameters, and wait time here.

data.name: TutorialStepBeforeAfterTaskDesc
data.value: "Before Task" automatically runs a specified action before tasks start (e.g., navigate to a specific screen); "After Task" runs after all tasks complete (e.g., exit game, close emulator).

data.name: TutorialStepSoftwarePathDesc
data.value: Set the emulator or game launch path here for fully automated operation. Note: You must select "Launch Game" or "Launch & Execute" in Connection Actions, or enable "Try to launch on connection failure" in Connection Settings for the launch path to take effect.

data.name: TutorialStepRewatchDesc
data.value: If you need to review this tutorial later, you can find the "Tutorial" button at the bottom of Settings → About page to re-watch it anytime.

data.name: SpecialTask_CountdownDesc
data.value: Continues to the next task after the specified seconds, supports `1~86400` seconds (24 hours), useful for adding delays between tasks.

data.name: SpecialTask_TimedWaitDesc
data.value: Pauses the task queue until a specified time of day (hour:minute). If the time has already passed today, waits until that time tomorrow.

data.name: SpecialTask_ToastDesc
data.value: Displays a toast notification with a custom message, useful for alerting when a certain point in the task queue is reached.

data.name: SpecialTask_CustomProgramDesc
data.value: Launches an external program or script, supports specifying program path and startup arguments, can optionally wait for the program to exit before continuing.

data.name: SpecialTask_KillProcessDesc
data.value: Terminates a running process by name, useful for closing games or other applications as part of the task flow.

data.name: SpecialTask_ComputerOperationDesc
data.value: Performs a system-level operation such as shutdown, restart, sleep or hibernate, useful for automated power management after long task runs.

data.name: SpecialTask_WebhookDesc
data.value: Sends an HTTP request to a specified URL with custom request body, useful for integrating with external services or automation platforms.

data.name: InstanceRunningCloseConfirm
data.value: Instance is running. Are you sure you want to stop and close it?

data.name: InstanceRunningCannotClose
data.value: This instance is running. Please stop the task before closing.

data.name: InstanceTimerReassigned
data.value: Instance "{0}" has been closed. Its scheduled tasks have been reassigned to another instance.
